era: Indie Rock. E=5 -- warm, textured, communal. Self-released. The campfire glow. v1.49.350.

location.formative: Seattle DIY scene. House shows, small venues, community-driven. KEXP support.
location.career: Campfire OK. 2012-present. Self-released. Atmospheric indie rock.

theory_nodes.concept: Campfire as aesthetic principle -- warmth, community, unpretentious gathering. The name declares the mission. Not a performance space -- a gathering space.
examples: Layered guitars as warmth, not spectacle.
theory_nodes.description: Campfire aesthetic. Warmth over spectacle. Community over reach.

genealogy.relationship: Campfire OK at 209. The fire at the center.

theory_nodes.concept: Self-released as credential in Seattle -- not a limitation but a badge of DIY authenticity. Bandcamp era dissolved barriers. Trade reach for autonomy.
examples: Autonomy over reach as conscious choice.
theory_nodes.description: Self-released as credential. Seattle DIY infrastructure. Autonomy over reach.

genealogy.relationship: Campfire OK at 209. Self-released indie rock.

cross_references.relationship: Previous degree. Soul-inflected vs. atmospheric indie. Different warmth.
Next degree. Self-released (209) to Merge Records (210). DIY to major indie label.
Same E=5. World/indie fusion. Different texture at same energy.
